## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss SEO performance and initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Significant growth in website visitors (6x increase) and impressions (35% increase) over the past month](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Need to refine content strategy to focus on more specific, use case-driven topics aligned with Firework's offerings](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Plans to implement lead magnets and optimize CTAs to improve conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [Importance of tying SEO efforts to MQL generation and distinguishing between enterprise and SMB-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Monthly visitors increased to 4.5k, a 6x increase from start](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [35% increase in impressions over the last two weeks (135k vs 100k)](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Clicks stable at around 1200 per month](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [New articles seeing 866% increase in clicks compared to existing articles](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Current topics deemed too broad (e.g., customer segmentation, cart abandonment)](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Need to focus on specific use cases and Firework's unique offerings](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Plan to develop 20-30 new topics targeting enterprise clients and specific industries](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Importance of showcasing how Firework solves specific business problems](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)

### Lead Magnet and CTA Optimization

  - [Proposal to create lead magnets (e.g., checklists, templates) for top-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [Discussion on moving CTA placement to the right side of blog posts for better visibility](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
  - [Consideration of adding related articles or featured content to blog sidebars](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=1843.0)

### Technical SEO Initiatives

  - [UTM tracking implementation pending; Ritesh to facilitate access to UTM generator file](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Need for user journey mapping to understand visitor behavior on the website](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [Plans to add schemas and improve ICP targeting](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Seasonal Content Planning

  - [Identified need to create content around shopping holidays (e.g., Easter, Mother's Day, Prime Day)](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=2049.0)
  - [Missed opportunity for Valentine's Day content noted; plan to create a yearly content calendar](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=2142.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create lead magnets for top-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [Develop 20-30 new, more targeted content topics focusing on specific use cases](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Implement UTM tracking with Ritesh's assistance](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Move CTA placement to the right side of blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
  - [Explore options for adding related/featured articles to blog sidebars](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=1843.0)
  - [Create a yearly content calendar for shopping holidays and seasonal topics](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
  - [Conduct A/B testing on lead magnets before adding additional elements to blog pages](https://fathom.video/share/5eaXFgg4h37njyExnUwPomi3LLp935mf?tab=summary&timestamp=2216.0)
